title: Blueprint Marketplace Workspace
concept: A visual-first Playground IA for documentation writers where the blueprint gallery is the default workspace and PR, GitHub, ZIP, save, saved management, and Site Manager flows remain adjacent actions.
focus: image-rich blueprint discovery as first viewport
context rail for selected blueprint and adjacent creation actions
full Site Manager preserved as a secondary workspace
flows: browse, filter, search, and select Blueprint gallery entries
start Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import
save a temporary Playground to browser storage or local directory with progress
manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds including rename and delete affordances
open Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, blueprint, database, and logs
export to GitHub and download a Playground as .zip
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
